entries.summary: Phase 1 completed: All CRITICAL security and documentation fixes implemented. Fixed timing attack vulnerability in API key comparison, added comprehensive authentication documentation across all user-facing docs.
lessons_learned: Always delegate file edits to paid_coder - never edit directly
Drift verification is mandatory before phase completion
QA gates must be run for every task without exception

entries.summary: Phase 1 completed: Removed all non-GGUF backends (OpenVINOLLM, OllamaLLM, OpenAICompatibleLLM), simplified SmartLLM to GGUF-only, added Gemma 4 model detection with think token suppression, cleaned RAGEngine and engine_factory of online parameters, removed dead code from main.py, cleaned api_server.py of online env var validations, updated requirements.txt.
lessons_learned: declare_scope tool caches task status from prior sessions even after plan.json is reset — clear stale evidence files AND plan.json task statuses to unblock
llm_interface.py had 360 lines of dead code (3 LLM classes) that no test caught — removal was clean with no test regressions
Task 1.6 (main.py) was dead code, not CLI arg removal — critic's codebase review caught this before execution, preventing coder confusion
Gemma 4 think token suppression uses stop parameter, not /no_think tag — /no_think is Qwen3-specific, not in Gemma 4 vocabulary
get_bundled_model_path() in app_paths.py should be the single source of truth for model discovery — engine_factory and app_gui must use it, not inline lists

entries.summary: Fixed GUI freeze (threading in app_gui.py) and improved GGUF memory check (4x multiplier). Fixed CI security scan failures (Safety 2.x vs 3.x API confusion). PR #12 merged to master.
lessons_learned: Safety 2.x policy format uses ignore-vulnerabilities (list of CVE IDs), NOT ignore-unpinned-requirements (Safety 3.x only)
GUI freeze fixes require _ensure_llm() inside background thread, not just moving the call
Multipliers in memory calculations need to account for KV cache at max context: file_size * 4 covers weights + KV cache for all context sizes
Pre-existing test failures on master must be distinguished from PR-introduced failures before acting
CI queue times (1.5h+) require cancelling stale runs and re-running targeted jobs rather than waiting
